src: A Meowth pokemon toy sitting and waving hands, in hyper-realistic anime-inspired style. It has oversized embroidered eyes and sharply defined lines around its face and limbs.
edit: A Meowth pokemon toy sitting and waving hands in a low-poly style, with blocky form and angular geometric shapes. Its face and limbs have flat planes and sharp edges, in a muted color palette.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The Pokemon is on a dark wooden table in the room corner, viewed slightly from above, with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from above, placed on a white metal lattice in a room corner with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: A Pokemon is lying on a black background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from below, sitting on a metal stick, with one leg hanging down and one partially hidden, against a plain white background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: A low-poly Pokémon is viewed slightly from above, appearing geometric and faceted with angular surfaces, on a dark wooden table. It is near the room corner with walls in a triangular, angular style, following low-poly art.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: A low-poly Pokemon viewed from above has a faceted, geometric design. It sits on a white metal lattice with simple intersecting lines. The room has plain white walls, flat surfaces, and sharp edges, reflecting early computer graphics and low-poly art styles.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: A pokemon with geometric facets in vibrant colors, arranged in a tessellated design. The black plain background contrasts, highlighting its low-poly aesthetic. Emphasizing angular lines and shape, the creature resembles a vibrant sculpture-like figure.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from below, in a low-poly design with geometric shapes. It sits on a faceted metal stick, one leg hangs down, while the other blends into the surface, on a plain white background.
